## Summary

Describe the change in 1-3 bullets.

## Type of Change

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Existing skill update
- [ ] Repository metadata or documentation
- [ ] Other maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] The skill name starts with `advai-` and matches the directory name
- [ ] Command examples use the correct `advai` subcommand
- [ ] Preconditions explain required setup or dependencies
- [ ] `README.md` is updated when the skill list or command mapping changes
- [ ] `skills.sh.json` is updated when repository grouping should change
- [ ] The change is scoped and does not include unrelated edits

## Notes

Add anything reviewers should pay attention to.
